message:
Add callback-style builder methods and migrate while.zig + with.zig

- Add withWhile, withFor, withIf, withBlock to ZigBuilder (callback style)
- Migrate while.zig to use callback-style withWhile
- Migrate with.zig to eliminate ALL emit calls (100% builder)
- Add captureStmt, captureScopedDiscards helpers to core.zig
- Pattern: Use callback to ensure proper block closing

Test: bool 140/143, unary 13/13, longexp 1/1 - no regressions
